structured_content.response:
The process for `process_rule_id 'J09D'` has been executed end-to-end:

- Temporary working tables were created, updated with `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, and all business rules (KSA/EVU plus location and house-number-based overrides) were applied.
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Sales vs. net data preference was applied as specified: where sales data exists it was used and net data was cleared logically in the final selection.
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was set to `MANDATORY_READING` for EQUNR with matching EABL records (ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" in both 2023 and 2024).
- Two CSVs were generated:
  - `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (1,199 rows) – only `MANDATORY_READING` entries.
  - `J09D.csv` (26,434 rows) – all remaining entries.
- Emails were (meta-)sent:
  - `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09D.csv` to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09D_temp`, `J09D_joined`, `J09D_joined2`, `J09D_final`) were deleted after export.

If you want, I can display a sample of the final data or of the mandatory-reading subset.

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id 'J09D'` has been fully executed.

Summary of what was done:
- Created and populated temporary working tables and applied all business rules (KSA/EVU plus location and house-number overrides).
- Joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Applied the preference for sales data over net data where available.
- Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = MANDATORY_READING` for EQUNR with qualifying EABL records (ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" in both 2023 and 2024).
- Generated two CSV files:
  - `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (1,199 rows).
  - `J09D.csv` (26,434 rows).
- (Meta-)sent:
  - `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09D.csv` to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped all temporary tables (`J09D_temp`, `J09D_joined`, `J09D_joined2`, `J09D_final`).

If you tell me what you want to inspect (e.g., sample rows, specific EQUNR, or rule logic), I can retrieve or summarize that next.
